meta.description: A single commit in a GitHub pull request.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_1a7ca1f8_b06d_4808_b9d4_be4e46d464c7" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "sha" TEXT,
    "message" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_1a7ca1f8_b06d_4808_b9d4_be4e46d464c7" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_1a7ca1f8b06d4808_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
